title: Fleischmannia marginata
taxonomy: Fleischmannia marginata belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Fleischmannia. The genus Fleischmannia is a part of the tribe Eupatorieae within the Asteraceae family. The plant is native to Mexico and Central America, and it is a member of the flowering plant clade Angiosperms. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
